---
title: "Data overview"
date: "Compiled at `r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', tz = 'UTC')` UTC"
output: 
  github_document: default
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 5
    toc_float: true
always_allow_html: true
params:
  name: "01_overview" # change if you rename file
---

```{r here, message=FALSE}
here::i_am(paste0(params$name, ".Rmd"), uuid = "939f7706-3574-435a-aaeb-5ae9ac700dc9")
```

```{r global-options, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  dev = c("png", "cairo_pdf"),
  fig.ext = c("png", "pdf"),
  fig.width = 8, 
  fig.height = 5, 
  dpi = 250,
  fig.path = paste0('figures/', params, "/overview_"),
  echo = FALSE)
```


```{r packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(conflicted)
library(phyloseq)
library(tidyverse)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggtext)
library(patchwork)

conflicts_prefer(dplyr::filter)
```

```{r directories}
# create or *empty* the target directory, used to write this file's data: 
#projthis::proj_create_dir_target(params$name, clean = TRUE)

# function to get path to target directory: path_target("sample.csv")
path_target <- projthis::proj_path_target(params$name)

# function to get path to previous data: path_source("00-import", "sample.csv")
path_source <- projthis::proj_path_source(params$name)
```

## Load data

```{r load-data}
phylo_asv   <- readRDS(path_source("00_build_dataset", "bact_phylo_2m_asv.rds"))
phylo_genus <- readRDS(path_source("00_build_dataset", "bact_phylo_2m_genus.rds"))
sampdata    <- readRDS(path_source("00_build_dataset", "sampdata.rds"))
```

```{r derive-tables}
otutab_asv   <- as(otu_table(phylo_asv),   "matrix")
otutab_genus <- as(otu_table(phylo_genus), "matrix")
```

### ASV level

```{r}
phylo_asv
```

### Genus level

```{r}
phylo_genus
```


## Sample characteristics

```{r sample-characteristics}
# Derive variable order from sampdata column sequence
var_order <- setdiff(names(sampdata), c("SampleID", "idx"))

tbl_sample_characteristics <- sampdata %>%
  select(all_of(var_order)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Variable = factor(Variable, levels = var_order)) %>%
  group_by(Variable, Value) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    `n (%)` = paste0(n, " (", round(100 * n / 592, 1), "%)")
  ) %>%
  select(Variable, Value, `n (%)`)

tbl_sample_characteristics %>%
  kbl(caption = "Cohort characteristics (N = 592)") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  collapse_rows(columns = 1, valign = "top")
```

```{r sample-characteristics-latex}
tbl_sample_characteristics %>%
  kbl(
    format   = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    caption  = "Cohort characteristics (N = 592)",
    label    = "sample-characteristics"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = "hold_position") %>%
  collapse_rows(columns = 1, valign = "top", latex_hline = "major") %>%
  save_kable(file = path_target("tbl_sample_characteristics.tex"))
```

## Metadata balance across groups

```{r metadata-balance, fig.width=9, fig.height=5}
cols = c("#009E73", "#56B4E9", "#E69F00", "#D55E00", 
         "#CC79A7", "#F0E442", "#0072B2", "gray")

sampdata %>%
  select(all_of(var_order)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Country, names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Variable = factor(Variable, levels = setdiff(var_order, "Country"))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Value)) %>%
  count(Country, Variable, Value) %>%
  group_by(Country, Variable) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = prop, fill = Country)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ Variable, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols[1:3]) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Proportion", fill = "Country",
       title = "Covariate distribution by country") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

## Sequencing depth

```{r seq-depth_text, fig.width=7, fig.height=4}
data.frame(depth = sample_sums(phylo_asv)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = depth)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, fill = "gray", colour = "white") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = median(sample_sums(phylo_asv)), linetype = "dashed", 
             colour = "black", linewidth = 0.9) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    x     = "Read depth (counts)",
    y     = "Number of samples",
    title = "Per-sample sequencing depth",
    subtitle = paste0("Median: ", scales::comma(median(sample_sums(phylo_asv))),
                      "  |  Range: ", scales::comma(min(sample_sums(phylo_asv))),
                      " – ", scales::comma(max(sample_sums(phylo_asv))))
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.title        = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 11),
    plot.title        = element_text(size = 14)
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```

```{r seq-depth, fig.width=7, fig.height=3}
data.frame(depth = sample_sums(phylo_asv)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = depth)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, fill = "gray", colour = "white") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = median(sample_sums(phylo_asv)), linetype = "dashed", 
             colour = "black", linewidth = 0.9) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    x     = "Read depth (counts)",
    y     = "Number of samples"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.title        = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 11),
    plot.title        = element_text(size = 14)
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```



## Files written

These files have been written to the target directory, ```r paste0("data/", params$name)```:

```{r list-files-target}
projthis::proj_dir_info(path_target())
```
